candidate_definition_hints.text: Minimal Publish is a stripped-down version of [Minimal Theme](https://github.com/kepano/obsidian-minimal) for [Obsidian Publish](https://obsidian.md/publish). The theme was rewritten from scratch to optimize loading speed.
